name: trust-sql-text2sql
description: Master text-to-SQL on unknown database schemas using multi-turn reinforcement learning with integrated tool use. Triggers: handling unfamiliar databases, exploring schema dynamically, multi-step query generation, interactive SQL debugging, schema-agnostic AI systems, adapting to new data models, building production SQL agents. Use cases: enterprise data analytics platforms, zero-shot database querying, schema discovery agents, multi-database applications, conversational SQL interfaces, adaptive data pipelines, automated report generation.
paperTitle: TRUST-SQL: Converting Natural Language to SQL Across Unknown Database Schemas
